assertions.title: Settings header uses Share Tech Mono typography

steps.action: Open /demo/dashboard-settings-lock-profile, wait for networkidle, then wait an additional 1000ms
steps.expected: Settings sidebar is visible and ready for style measurement

steps.action: Read computed style of visible Settings header text

assertions.issues: Font regression: Settings header is rendered with Inter instead of Share_Tech_Mono.

assertions.title: Peer rows expose trailing ellipsis + play-triangle icons when sidebar open

steps.action: Inspect visible peer rows (#0/#1/#2) with sidebar open
steps.expected: Each row shows both trailing icons (ellipsis + play)
steps.observed: All 3 rows render two trailing icon buttons each: aria-labels 'Peer #N actions' and 'Open peer #N'.
Peer #0 actions: failure; Open peer #0: failure; interception: settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events.
Peer #1 actions: failure; Open peer #1: failure; interception: settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events.
Peer #2 actions: failure; Open peer #2: failure; interception: settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events.

clickResults.Peer #0 actions: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events
clickResults.Open peer #0: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events
clickResults.Peer #1 actions: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events
clickResults.Open peer #1: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events
clickResults.Peer #2 actions: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events
clickResults.Open peer #2: failure - settings-sidebar subtree intercepts pointer events

assertions.issues: Icon presence passes, but clickability fails for all visible rows due pointer-event interception by the open settings sidebar.

assertions.title: Export Profile flow: sidebar → Export → submit → Backup Ready → Done

steps.action: From open settings sidebar, click Export row action
Fill Export Password + Confirm Password with matching values and submit Export
Click Done on Backup Ready modal
steps.expected: Modal closes and sidebar remains visible
steps.observed: Modal closed, but sidebar no longer visible (no Close settings button or sidebar controls in interactive tree).

assertions.issues: After Done, sidebar is closed/hidden instead of remaining visible.

frictions.description: Peer-row trailing icon buttons are present in DOM while sidebar is open but are not exposed in snapshot interactive refs; role-based direct click checks were required.
frictions.resolution: Validated presence via DOM inspection and validated clickability via role-based click attempts for each row/icon pair.

summary: Rechecked 3 assertions: 0 passed, 3 failed. VAL-DSH-012 failed on computed font-family (Inter), VAL-DSH-013 failed clickability (all peer-row icons intercepted by sidebar), and VAL-DSH-031 failed because sidebar is not visible after Done from Backup Ready.
